code: import{useAPI}from'../../api/API';import{userStateSchema}from'./LoginDTO';export function useLoginAPI(){var _useAPI=useAPI(),requestJSON=_useAPI.requestJSON;return{login:function login(values){return requestJSON('POST','/api/partnerdb/consultants/login',{data:values}).then(function(data){return userStateSchema.cast(data);});}};}export function useSwitchAppAPI(){var _useAPI2=useAPI(),requestJSON=_useAPI2.requestJSON;return{switchApp:function switchApp(values){return requestJSON('POST','/api/partnerdb/consultants/switch_app',{data:values}).then(function(data){return userStateSchema.cast(data.data);});}};}
